summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Alpha Agency Phase 4 features: Budget Cashflow Projection (multi-month) and AI Assistant (Perplexity integration). All 25 backend API tests passed. Frontend features verified working with Playwright UI tests.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/budget/cashflow - Requires start_month parameter (422)
Backend: GET /api/budget/cashflow?start_month=2025-01 - Returns cashflow projection (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/budget/cashflow?months=3 - Returns 3 months projection (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/budget/cashflow?months=6 - Returns 6 months projection (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/budget/cashflow?months=12 - Returns 12 months projection (200 OK)
Backend: Cashflow data structure includes month, label, income, expense, net_flow, cumulative_balance, data_type
Backend: Cashflow summary includes total_income, total_expense, net_flow, avg_monthly_flow, ending_balance
Backend: Cashflow API requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/ai/status - Returns AI status with enabled, calls_today, daily_limit, remaining, max_message_length (200 OK)
Backend: AI status shows daily_limit=50 and correct remaining count
Backend: AI is enabled (Perplexity API key configured)
Backend: AI status API requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/ai/chat - General context chat works (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/ai/chat - Pipeline context returns CRM data (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/ai/chat - Contacts context works (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/ai/chat - Invoices context works (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/ai/chat - Budget context works (200 OK)
Backend: AI chat updates usage counter correctly
Backend: AI chat API requires authentication (401)
Backend: AI chat with empty messages returns error (521)
Backend: GET /api/ai/history - Returns conversation history list (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/ai/history?limit=5 - Respects limit parameter (200 OK)
Backend: AI history API requires authentication (401)
Backend: AI uses actual CRM data in responses (pipeline value 17,500€)
Backend: Cashflow includes data_type field (actual/forecast)
Frontend: Budget page loads with 6 tabs including 'Cashflow'
Frontend: Cashflow tab shows 'Projection de trésorerie' title
Frontend: Cashflow tab has month selector input
Frontend: Cashflow tab has duration selector (3, 6, 12 mois)
Frontend: Cashflow tab shows 4 summary cards (Revenus totaux, Dépenses totales, Flux net moyen, Solde final)
Frontend: Cashflow tab shows 'Évolution du cashflow' chart with AreaChart
Frontend: Cashflow tab shows 'Détails mensuels' table
Frontend: AI Assistant page accessible via /admin/assistant
Frontend: AI Assistant link visible in sidebar menu
Frontend: AI Assistant shows 'Propulsé par Perplexity AI' subtitle
Frontend: AI Assistant shows request counter (X/50 requêtes restantes)
Frontend: AI Assistant has context selector (Général, Contacts, Pipeline, Facturation, Budget)
Frontend: AI Assistant has usage section showing daily requests
Frontend: AI Assistant has chat input and send button
Frontend: AI Assistant shows suggested prompts
Frontend: AI Assistant chat works - sends message and receives AI response with CRM data
updated_files: /app/tests/test_phase4_ai_cashflow.py - Created comprehensive test suite for Phase 4 features
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing CRM data (102 contacts, 7 opportunities, 6 invoices)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully tested and working. Budget Cashflow tab provides multi-month projection with AreaChart visualization, summary cards, and detailed monthly table. Data types are marked as 'actual' or 'forecast'. AI Assistant uses Perplexity API (model: sonar) with 50 requests/day limit per user. AI has access to CRM context (pipeline, contacts, invoices, budget) and provides intelligent responses with actual data. Conversations are stored in 'ai_conversations' collection and usage tracked in 'ai_usage' collection. The Perplexity API key is configured in backend/.env as PERPLEXITY_API_KEY.
